titlestmt.titleproper: Health pamphlets issued by Metropolitan Life and other insurance companies
Metropolitan Life and other insurance companies, health pamphlets issued by
titlestmt.author: Katherine Isham

publicationstmt.publisher: Medical Historical Library, Cushing/Whitney Medical Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Medical Historical Library, Cushing/Whitney Medical Library

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Tuesday July 30, 2024 at 02:00

did.unittitle: Health pamphlets issued by Metropolitan Life and other insurance companies

corpname.part: Medical Historical Library, Cushing/Whitney Medical Library

did.abstract: The collection includes pamphlets issued by the Metropolitan Life Insurance Company and other American insurance companies on topics related to health and wellness, published between 1875-1976. Topics include children's health, citizenship, dental care, disease, first aid, infectious disease, longevity, nutrition, public health, sanitation, and "health heroes". The bulk of the collection was issued by the Metropolitan Life Insurance Company, contents also include pamphlets issued by the John Hancock Mutual Life Insurance Company, Mutual Life Insurance Company, New York Life Insurance Company, and Prudential LIfe Insurance Company of America.

corpname.part: John Hancock Mutual Life Insurance Company

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The collection is open for research.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The collection was created by Medical Historical Library staff from items gifted by Bert Hansen, 2019, gifted by Naomi Rodgers, 2023, and items of unknown provenance.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The collection is arranged in two series: Series I. Metropolitan Life Insurance Company, 1898-1978. and Series II. Other insurance companies, 1875-1936.
Series I. Metropolitan Life Insurance Company, 1898-1970, is further arranged in subseries by topic. Subseries are arranged by publication date, then alphabetically by title.
Series II. Other insurance companies, 1875-1936, is further arranged in subseries by company. Subseries are arranged alphabetically by publication title.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Health pamphlets issued by Metropolitan Life and other insurance companies. Historical Library, Harvey Cushing / John Hay Whitney Medical Library, Yale University.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The collection includes pamphlets issued by the Metropolitan Life Insurance Company and other American insurance companies on topics related to health and wellness, published between 1875-1976. Topics include children's health, citizenship, dental care, disease, first aid, infectious disease, longevity, nutrition, public health, sanitation, and "health heroes". The bulk of the collection was issued by the Metropolitan Life Insurance Company, contents also include pamphlets issued by John Hancock Mutual Life Insurance Company, Mutual Life Insurance Company, New York Life Insurance Company, and Prudential Life Insurance Company of America.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright status for collection materials is unknown. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

did.unittitle: Series I. Metropolitan Life Insurance Company
Children's health
Metropolitan Life Insurance Company, ABC . New York City, New York.
Metropolitan Life Insurance Company, ABC . New York City, New York.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copies from 2 later printings of previous listing, same content with different cover.

Metropolitan Life Insurance Company, Common childhood diseases . New York City, New York, 1954.
Metropolitan Life Insurance Company, Good habits for children . New York City, New York.

Metropolitan Life Insurance Company, Postcards , New York City, New York.

Metropolitan Life Insurance Company, The child . New York City, New York, 1912.
Wile, Dr. Ira S., The child . New York City, New York: Metropolitan Life Insurance Company Press.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains a portion of the 1912 pamphlet in smaller format.

did.unittitle: Metropolitan Life Insurance Company, The child . New York City, New York.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Same cover and title, but different contents from other 2 editions.

did.unittitle: Metropolitan Life Insurance Company, The custodian and the school child . New York City, New York.

Metropolitan Life Insurance Company, The junior safety volunteer . New York City, New York.
Metropolitan Life Insurance Company, The magic health book . New York City, New York, 1920.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes clear red "wonder glass" viewer that reveals hidden images.

did.unittitle: Metropolitan Life Insurance Company, The merry metros mother metropolitan's health children in cute comedies reel , New York City, New York.
Watson, Elizabeth C., Metropolitan Life Insurance Company, The metropolitan mother goose . New York City, New York.
Metropolitan Life Insurance Company, What teachers dee . New York City, New York, 1954.
Metropolitan Life Insurance Company, Your friend the doctor . New York City, New York.
School Health Bureau

Metropolitan Life Insurance Company, Welfare Division, School Health Bureau, Monograph No. 2, Diphtheria immunizations in schools: suggestions for a workable program . New York City, New York.

Metropolitan Life Insurance Company, Welfare Division School Health Monograph No. 3, Hand-washing facilities in schools: a report of a survey of the facilities found in 404 schools located in 22 states and the dominion of Canada , New York City, New York, circa 1928.
Metropolitan Life Insurance Company, Welfare Division, School Health Monograph No. 4. The teacher's health: what some communities are doing to conserve it . New York City, New York.
Metropolitan Life Insurance Company, Welfare Division, School Health Bureau Monograph No. 5. A school health study of Newton, Massachusetts . New York City, New York, circa 1927.
Turner, C.E., Lytle, E.L., School Health Monograph No. 7 Metropolitan Life Insurance Company, The nature of bacteria: a description of units of work . New York City, New York, 1932.

Black, George H., Bragg, Mabel C., Brister, J.W., Ryan, W. Carson, Withers, John W. Metropolitan Life Insurance Company, Welfare Division, School Health Monograph No. 8. Health programs in professional schools for teachers . New York City, New York.

Spencer, M.E., Dowell, A.S., Metropolitan Life Insurance Company, Welfare Division, School Health Bureau, Monograph No. 9, Health education in the state normal school at Towson, Maryland , New York City, New York.
Metropolitan Life Insurance Company, Health and Welfare Division, The school health program . School Health Monograph No. 12. New York City, New York.
Citizenship
Metropolitan Life Insurance Company, Are you a true American? New York City, New York.
Metropolitan Life Insurance Company, Every resident a citizen: why not? . New York City, New York.

Kley, Michael. How to take out your second or citizen papers . New York City, New York: Metropolitan Life Insurance Company Press.
Dental care
Hyatt, Thaddeus P., Care of the teeth: A peep into the future . New York City, New York: Metropolitan Life Insurance Company Press, 1920.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copies from 3 printings of same pamphlet.

Disease

Metropolitan Life Insurance Company, The most common form of cancer - and what you should know about it , New York City, New York, 1940.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Pamphlet unfolds to show progressively larger prints. Content includes stories from the day's work of the welfare division and large poster on the reverse side titled "The Service Bureaus of the Welfare Division."

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes pamphlet published by the New York City Cancer Committee and the American Society for the Control of Cancer which lists hospitals that provide cancer care in New York City.
